beskrivelse.no: Risikoer knyttet til behandling av personopplysninger
beskrivelse.en: Risks related to the processing of personal data

risikoelement.en: Missing or invalid legal basis for processing

saarbarhet.en: Unclear legal basis and missing consent

eksisterendeKontroll.en: Annual review of legal basis for processing

foreslaatteTiltak.en: Document the legal basis for processing, implement a consent solution, and perform legal review

risikoelement.no: Persondata brukes til andre formål enn opprinnelig
risikoelement.en: Personal data is used for purposes other than the original purpose

saarbarhet.en: Missing purpose limitation and overly broad data collection

foreslaatteTiltak.en: Purpose limitation in the system and data minimization

saarbarhet.no: Samler inn mer data enn nødvendig

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Data minimization by design, regular data inventory gjennomgang
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Data minimization by design, regular data inventory review

risikoelement.no: Kan ikke oppfylle rett til sletting
risikoelement.en: Cannot fulfill the right to erasure

saarbarhet.no: Data spredt i mange systemer, manglende oversikt
saarbarhet.en: Data is spread across many systems and there is no overview

foreslaatteTiltak.en: Data inventory, centralized deletion functionality, and testing

risikoelement.no: Kan ikke oppfylle rett til dataportabilitet
risikoelement.en: Cannot fulfill the right to data portability

saarbarhet.no: Data i proprietære formater, ingen eksportfunksjon
saarbarhet.en: Data is stored in proprietary formats and there is no export function

foreslaatteTiltak.en: Automatic export in a structured format (JSON/CSV)

risikoelement.no: Kan ikke identifisere all data om en person
risikoelement.en: Cannot identify all data about an individual

saarbarhet.en: Data is spread out and mapping is missing

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Complete data inventory, data lineage sporing, tagging
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Complete data inventory, data lineage tracking, tagging

risikoelement.en: Personal data is shared without a data processing agreement

saarbarhet.no: Uklar oversikt over alle databehandlere, manglende avtaler
saarbarhet.en: Unclear overview of all data processors and missing agreements

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Register over databehandlere, avtalemal, leverandør management
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Register of data processors, agreement templates, and vendor management

risikoelement.en: Transfers to third countries take place without a valid legal basis

saarbarhet.no: Uklar oversikt over hvor data lagres, sky-tjenester i USA
saarbarhet.en: Uklar overview over hvor data is stored, cloud-services in USA

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Data residency-krav, EU-region for sky, SCC
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Define data residency requirements, use EU regions for cloud services where necessary, and put SCCs in place where transfers require them

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Sub-processor register, notification requirements, audit rights
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Sub-processor register, notification requirements, audit rights

saarbarhet.no: Data i klartekst at rest og in transit
saarbarhet.en: Data in plaintext at rest and in transit

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Encryption at rest, TLS 1.3, field-level encryption for sensitive data
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Encryption at rest, TLS 1.3, field-level encryption for sensitive data

saarbarhet.en: Personal data alltid in identifiserbar form

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Pseudonymization for analytics, anonymization techniques, k-anonymity
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Pseudonymization for analytics, anonymization techniques, k-anonymity

saarbarhet.no: Ikke i stand til å varsle innen 72 timer
saarbarhet.en: Not in stand to varsle innen 72 timer

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Breach notification playbook, pre-drafted templates, DPO involvement
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Breach notification playbook, pre-drafted templates, DPO involvement
